  • Hide All Code

Pipeline 2: ROC curve

R. Espada

This code reproduces figure 2 in the manuscript Espada et al 2020.

Using a set of known mutants, this code calculates the signal and noise obtained with or without the proposed correction.

Inputs

Load general inputs

Mutant sequences to table

data_mutations <- list()
for(i in 1:nrow(mutant_sequences)){
  index <- which (mutant_sequences[i,]!= reference_sequence)
  data_mutations[[i]] <- data.frame(sequence_id=rep(rownames(mutant_sequences)[i], length(index) ),
                              position = index,  nucleotide =mutant_sequences[i,index])
}
data_mutations <- do.call(rbind,data_mutations)

Compute

Load and shape data from all mutants (_forward_FrequenciesModelPriors.txt files and compare them to reference_sequence)

n <-0
for(bc_i in inNames){
  n<- n+1
  #Barcode info
  actual_mutations <- data_mutations%>%                   #mutations present in this barcode
    filter(sequence_id==bc_i)%>% select(nucleotide, position)
  actual_mutations <- actual_mutations[which(actual_mutations$nucleotide!="-"),]
  
  #load data
  dataF <- read.table(paste0(inPath,bc_i,"_forward_FrequenciesModelPriors.txt"), header=T)
  dataR <- read.table(paste0(inPath,bc_i,"_reverse_FrequenciesModelPriors.txt"), header=T)
  
  dataF <- dataF%>% filter(isWT==0 & nucleotide!="-")    #remove gaps and wildtype (I only study mutations/errors)
  dataR <- dataR%>% filter(isWT==0 & nucleotide!="-")    #remove gaps and wildtype (I only study mutations/errors)
  
  #combine forward and reverse, and choose relevant columns
  data <- rbind(dataF, dataR) %>%
    mutate(sequence_id=bc_i, p_right_minION = 1-p_error_minION)%>%
    select(sequence_id,position, nucleotide, counts, quality, p_right_minION, p_right_null_model, p_right_priors_model) %>%
    filter(!is.na(p_right_priors_model))
  
  signal_data_aux <- left_join(actual_mutations, data,by = c("nucleotide", "position"))
  noise_data_aux  <- anti_join(data, actual_mutations,by = c("nucleotide", "position"))
  
  if(nrow(signal_data_aux)+nrow(noise_data_aux) != nrow(data)){stop('Check joins of data')}
  
  #Store data
  if(n==1){
    signal_data <- signal_data_aux
    noise_data  <- noise_data_aux 
  }else{
    signal_data <- rbind(signal_data,signal_data_aux)
    noise_data  <- rbind(noise_data, noise_data_aux) 
  }
  rm(signal_data_aux, noise_data_aux, dataF, dataR, data)
}

Compute signal and noise

p_cutoff_vec <- sort(c(0,10^seq(-10,-1, by=.5),seq(0.1,.99, by=0.01)))

signal_tp <- data.frame(matrix(NA, ncol=7, nrow=length(p_cutoff_vec)))
colnames(signal_tp) <- c("pcutoff", "Guppy", "Correction Naive", "SINGLe", "Guppy - weighted", "Correction Naive - weighted", "SINGLe - weighted")
signal_fn <- noise_tn <- noise_fp <- signal_tp
for(i in seq_along(p_cutoff_vec)){
  p_cutoff <- p_cutoff_vec[i]
  
  signal_tp_aux <-  signal_data %>%
    summarise(counts_minION = sum(counts[p_right_minION       >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_null   = sum(counts[p_right_null_model   >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors = sum(counts[p_right_priors_model >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_minION_w = sum( (counts*p_right_minION)       [p_right_minION       >= p_cutoff]),
              counts_null_w   = sum( (counts*p_right_null_model)   [p_right_null_model   >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors_w = sum( (counts*p_right_priors_model) [p_right_priors_model >= p_cutoff])
    )
  
  signal_fn_aux <-  signal_data %>%
    summarise(counts_minION = sum(counts[p_right_minION       < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_null   = sum(counts[p_right_null_model   < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors = sum(counts[p_right_priors_model < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_minION_w = sum( (counts*p_right_minION)       [p_right_minION       < p_cutoff]),
              counts_null_w   = sum( (counts*p_right_null_model)   [p_right_null_model   < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors_w = sum( (counts*p_right_priors_model) [p_right_priors_model < p_cutoff])
    )
  
  noise_fp_aux <-  noise_data %>%
    summarise(counts_minION = sum(counts[p_right_minION       >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_null   = sum(counts[p_right_null_model   >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors = sum(counts[p_right_priors_model >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_minION_w = sum( (counts*p_right_minION)       [p_right_minION       >= p_cutoff]),
              counts_null_w   = sum( (counts*p_right_null_model)   [p_right_null_model   >= p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors_w = sum( (counts*p_right_priors_model) [p_right_priors_model >= p_cutoff])
    )
  
  noise_tn_aux <-  noise_data %>%
    summarise(counts_minION = sum(counts[p_right_minION       < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_null   = sum(counts[p_right_null_model   < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors = sum(counts[p_right_priors_model < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_minION_w = sum( (counts*p_right_minION)       [p_right_minION       < p_cutoff]),
              counts_null_w   = sum( (counts*p_right_null_model)   [p_right_null_model   < p_cutoff]), 
              counts_priors_w = sum( (counts*p_right_priors_model) [p_right_priors_model < p_cutoff])
    )
  
  signal_tp[i,] <- c(p_cutoff, unlist(signal_tp_aux))
  noise_fp [i,] <- c(p_cutoff, unlist(noise_fp_aux))
  signal_fn[i,] <- c(p_cutoff, unlist(signal_fn_aux))
  noise_tn [i,] <- c(p_cutoff, unlist(noise_tn_aux))
}


aux_tp <- melt(signal_tp[,c(1:4)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "signal_tp")
aux_fp <- melt(noise_fp[,c(1:4)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "noise_fp")
aux_fn <- melt(signal_fn[,c(1:4)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "signal_fn")
aux_tn <- melt(noise_tn[,c(1:4)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "noise_tn")
rates <- aux_tp %>% full_join(aux_fp,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))%>% full_join(aux_fn,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))%>%full_join(aux_tn,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))
rates <- rates%>%
  mutate(ratio = signal_tp / noise_fp)%>%
  mutate(tpr   = signal_tp / (signal_tp + signal_fn))%>%
  mutate(fpr   = noise_fp /  (noise_fp + noise_tn))

aux_tp <- melt(signal_tp[,c(1,5:7)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "signal_tp")
aux_fp <- melt(noise_fp[,c(1,5:7)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "noise_fp")
aux_fn <- melt(signal_fn[,c(1,5:7)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "signal_fn")
aux_tn <- melt(noise_tn[,c(1,5:7)], id.vars = "pcutoff", value.name = "noise_tn")
rates_w <-  aux_tp %>% full_join(aux_fp,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))%>% full_join(aux_fn,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))%>%full_join(aux_tn,by = c("pcutoff", "variable"))
rates_w <- rates_w%>%
  mutate(ratio=signal_tp/noise_fp)%>%
  mutate(tpr = signal_tp/ (signal_tp + signal_fn))%>%
  mutate(fpr = noise_fp / (noise_fp + noise_tn))


#write.table(rates, file="ROCcurve_rates.txt", row.names = F)
#write.table(rates_w, file="ROCcurve_ratesweighted.txt", row.names = F)

Plots

General aestetics

theme_pannel_1c <- theme(line=element_line(colour = "black", size = 0.5, linetype = "dashed",lineend = "square"), 
                         rect= element_rect(fill = NULL, colour = NULL, size = 1,linetype = "solid",inherit.blank = FALSE), 
                         text=element_text(size=10),
                         axis.text.x=element_text(angle=0, size=rel(0.9)),
                         axis.text.y=element_text(angle=0, size=rel(0.9)),
                         legend.text=element_text(size=rel(0.6), lineheight = 0),
                         legend.title=element_text(size=rel(0.65)), 
                         legend.key.height = unit(0.2,"cm"),
                         legend.background = element_rect(fill=NULL, colour = NULL),
                         legend.position = c(0.01,0.98),
                         legend.justification = c(0,1)
)

Plot of signal to noise vs cut-off (Fig 1 and supplementary)

plot_ratio <-
ggplot(rates, aes(pcutoff, y=ratio, col=variable))+geom_point(size=0.3)+geom_line()+
  ylab("Ratio signal to noise")+xlab(expression("Cut off on p"["right"]))+
  scale_color_discrete("Protocol")+
  theme_bw()+theme_pannel_1c
plot_ratio

plot_ratio_w <-
  ggplot(rates_w, aes(pcutoff, y=ratio, col=variable))+geom_point(size=0.3)+geom_line()+
  ylab("Ratio signal to noise")+xlab(expression("Cut off on p"["right"]))+
  scale_color_discrete("Protocol")+
  theme_bw()+theme_pannel_1c
plot_ratio_w

#TPR and FPR
plot_tpr <- ggplot(rates, aes(pcutoff, y=tpr, col=variable))+geom_point(size=0.7)+scale_color_discrete("Protocol")+
  geom_line()+  theme_bw()+theme_pannel_1c+theme(legend.justification = c(.5,.5))
plot_fpr <- ggplot(rates, aes(pcutoff, y=fpr, col=variable))+geom_point(size=0.7)+scale_color_discrete("Protocol")+
  geom_line()+  theme_bw()+theme_pannel_1c+theme(legend.justification = c(.5,.5))


plot_suppl <- ggarrange(plot_tpr, plot_fpr, ncol=2,nrow=1, common.legend = T, legend = "bottom")
  
plot_suppl

Other plots (ROC curve and FN TP FP TN)

plot_roc <- ggplot(rates, aes(y=tpr,x=fpr, col=variable))+geom_point()+
  geom_line()+ggtitle("ROC curve")
plot_roc

plot_tp <- ggplot(rates, aes(x=pcutoff, y=signal_tp, col=variable))+geom_point()+
  geom_line()+ggtitle("True Positives")
plot_tp

plot_tn <- ggplot(rates, aes(x=pcutoff, y=noise_tn, col=variable))+geom_point()+
  geom_line()+ggtitle("True Negatives")
plot_tn

plot_fp <- ggplot(rates, aes(x=pcutoff, y=noise_fp, col=variable))+geom_point()+
  geom_line()+ggtitle("False Positives")
plot_fp

plot_fn <- ggplot(rates, aes(x=pcutoff, y=signal_fn, col=variable))+geom_point()+
  geom_line()+ggtitle("False Negatives")
plot_fn

Weighted counts

Repeat plots for weighted counts (instead of summing one to each occurrence, I sum the associated weight or prob_of_being_right)

#Ratio signal to noise
plot_ratio_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(pcutoff, y=ratio, col=variable))+ geom_line()+ylab("ratio signal to noise")+ggtitle("Signal to noise")
plot_ratio_w

plot_tpr_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(pcutoff, y=tpr, col=variable))+  geom_line()
plot_tpr_w

plot_fpr_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(pcutoff, y=fpr, col=variable))+  geom_line()
plot_fpr_w

plot_roc_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(y=tpr,x=fpr, col=variable))+  geom_line()+ggtitle("ROC curve")
plot_roc_w

plot_tp_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(x=pcutoff, y=signal_tp, col=variable))+  geom_line()+ggtitle("True Positives")
plot_tp_w

plot_tn_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(x=pcutoff, y=noise_tn, col=variable))+  geom_line()+ggtitle("True Negatives")
plot_tn_w

plot_fp_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(x=pcutoff, y=noise_fp, col=variable))+  geom_line()+ggtitle("False Positives")
plot_fp_w

plot_fn_w <- ggplot(rates_w, aes(x=pcutoff, y=signal_fn, col=variable))+  geom_line()+ggtitle("False Negatives")
plot_fn_w
